title: 23.5'' Round Adjustable Height Glass Cocktail Table
features: Choose your height from 33.5'' to 41'' using the adjustable lever on our versatile, round glass cocktail table.
This table is a great addition to any venue or party rental company inventory as it can be used for resting drinks or snacks as well as a display table for flowers or other decorative items.
The glass top with chrome base combination that is featured on the table gives it an elegant and contemporary appearance.
Other features include a protective base rin that prevents floors from scratching and a very easy to clean glass swivel top that can be used for a variety of events.
